seo.title: VPS Hosting (Hetzner, etc.) tools directory
seo.description: A developer-first directory of VPS Hosting (Hetzner, etc.) tools and references.

content.intro: A curated directory of infrastructure providers, deployment tools, and security utilities optimized for developers managing their own VPS environments. This list focuses on high-performance European providers and open-source management stacks.

entries.name: Hetzner Cloud
entries.description: High-performance cloud instances with primary data centers in Germany, Finland, and the USA. Known for market-leading price-to-performance ratios.
pros: Exceptional CPU performance for the price
GDPR compliant with EU-based data centers
cons: Strict account verification process
Limited managed services compared to AWS

entries.name: Kamal
entries.description: A tool by 37signals to deploy Dockerized applications to any VPS using SSH. Handles zero-downtime deploys and rolling restarts without a complex PaaS.
pros: No vendor lock-in; works on any SSH-enabled server
cons: Requires Docker knowledge
No built-in logging or monitoring dashboard

entries.name: Coolify
entries.description: An open-source, self-hosted alternative to Heroku and Netlify. Provides a GUI for managing VPS deployments, databases, and services.
cons: Resource overhead on small 1GB RAM instances
Still in rapid development with frequent UI changes

entries.name: Caddy
entries.description: An extensible, open-source web server with automatic HTTPS by default. Ideal for use as a reverse proxy on a single VPS.
pros: Automatic SSL certificate issuance via Let's Encrypt
Written in Go with no external dependencies
cons: Performance slightly lower than Nginx for raw throughput
Module ecosystem requires custom builds

entries.name: Contabo
entries.description: German hosting provider offering high-specification VPS with large amounts of RAM and storage at very low price points.
pros: Highest RAM-per-dollar ratio in the market
cons: Provisioning can take longer than cloud providers
Old-school dashboard interface

entries.name: Netdata
entries.description: Real-time performance and health monitoring for Linux systems. Provides high-resolution metrics with zero configuration.
cons: Data retention requires external database for long-term storage
Cloud dashboard can be overwhelming

entries.name: Ansible
entries.description: Agentless automation tool for configuring and managing VPS instances via SSH. Uses YAML-based playbooks.
pros: No agent installation required on target servers
Massive library of community roles (Ansible Galaxy)
cons: Steep learning curve for complex orchestrations
SSH overhead can slow down tasks on many servers

entries.name: Tailscale
entries.description: A zero-config VPN that creates a secure mesh network between your VPS, local machine, and other devices using WireGuard.
pros: Securely access VPS internal ports without public exposure
SSH access management integrated with SSO
cons: Proprietary control plane
Performance overhead of user-space WireGuard in some cases

entries.name: Uptime Kuma
entries.description: A self-hosted monitoring tool that checks the status of your services and sends notifications when they go down.
pros: Supports HTTP(S), Ping, DNS, and Docker container checks
Integrated with Telegram, Discord, and Slack notifications
cons: Requires a separate VPS for reliable 'outsider' monitoring
Limited historical data analysis

entries.name: Fail2ban
entries.description: An intrusion prevention framework that protects servers against brute-force attacks by monitoring log files and banning IPs.
pros: Essential for securing SSH on public-facing VPS
cons: Can accidentally lock out legitimate users
Regex-based log parsing can be complex to debug

entries.name: Dokku
entries.description: The smallest PaaS implementation you've ever seen. Allows 'git push' deployments to your own VPS using Docker.
pros: Minimal resource overhead compared to K8s
Extensive plugin system for databases and SSL
cons: Single-node by design (harder to scale horizontally)
Primarily CLI-driven with no official GUI

entries.name: OVHcloud
entries.description: One of the largest European hosting providers offering a wide range of VPS and dedicated server options with strong DDoS protection.
pros: World-class DDoS protection included by default
Transparent pricing with no hidden bandwidth costs
cons: Support response times can be slow on basic plans
Interface is complex due to the volume of products
